name: plaid-pattern-account-funding
description: Plaid Pattern - Account Funding sample app

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.db:create: psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE plaid_pattern_account_funding" || true && psql -U postgres -d plaid_pattern_account_funding -f database/init/create.sql
scripts.db:reset: psql -U postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS plaid_pattern_account_funding" && npm run db:create
